description: Fix Muse connection for production, activate Datadog observability, and retrain stress/flow models above the 60% activation threshold so experiments can start tonight.

userStories.title: Fix dead ML backend URL fallback in ml-api.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the ML backend URL default to point to localhost:8000 instead of an expired ngrok URL so the app doesn't fail silently in development.
acceptanceCriteria: In client/src/lib/ml-api.ts lines 1-3, the fallback URL changes from 'https://brendan-postanesthetic-soliloquisingly.ngrok-free.dev' to 'http://localhost:8000'
grep -r 'brendan-postanesthetic' . returns zero matches
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add pingBackend utility to ml-api.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a pingBackend() function that silently checks if the ML backend is reachable so the UI can show a warm-up spinner instead of a cryptic error.
acceptanceCriteria: Export async function pingBackend(timeoutMs = 12000): Promise<boolean> added to client/src/lib/ml-api.ts
Function uses AbortController with the given timeout
Function calls GET /health on getMLApiUrl()
Returns true if response.ok, false on any error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add warm-up spinner to StudySession muse-pair screen
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to see 'Waking up ML backend…' instead of a broken connection error when the Render backend is cold-starting so I know to wait.
acceptanceCriteria: backendReady state (boolean | null) added to StudySession component
useEffect pings backend via pingBackend() when phase === 'muse-pair'
While backendReady === null: 'Waking up ML backend…' spinner shown in Card
While backendReady === false: amber warning text shown
Pair Muse 2 button disabled while backendChecking is true
pingBackend imported from @/lib/ml-api in the import statement
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix Render CORS_ORIGINS to include Vercel production URL
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Render ML backend to accept requests from the Vercel production frontend so CORS doesn't silently block Muse connection attempts.
acceptanceCriteria: render.yaml CORS_ORIGINS value includes 'https://dream-analysis.vercel.app'
render.yaml CORS_ORIGINS value includes 'https://dream-analysis-*.vercel.app' for preview deployments
render.yaml CORS_ORIGINS still includes all localhost variants
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Datadog APM env vars to render.yaml
userStories.description: As a developer, I need DD_SITE, DD_SERVICE, and DD_ENV set in render.yaml so Datadog APM activates when DD_API_KEY is added in the Render dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: render.yaml envVars block includes DD_SITE with value 'datadoghq.com'
render.yaml envVars block includes DD_SERVICE with value 'neural-dream-ml'
render.yaml envVars block includes DD_ENV with value 'production'
render.yaml envVars block includes DD_API_KEY with sync: false (secret)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Wire Datadog accuracy metrics in ML backend auto-retraining loop
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the auto-retraining loop to emit model accuracy as a Datadog metric so I can see when models improve or degrade after each retrain.
acceptanceCriteria: In ml/main.py, the comment '# Report accuracy to Datadog' is replaced with actual statsd.gauge() calls
statsd.gauge('eeg.model.retrain_accuracy', acc * 100) called when accuracy is available in result dict
The metric emission is wrapped in try/except so it never crashes the retrain loop
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Datadog Browser RUM SDK to client/index.html
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Datadog Browser RUM initialized in index.html so frontend errors, failed network requests, and WebSocket drops are captured in the Datadog dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Datadog Browser RUM <script> block added inside <head> of client/index.html
Script calls DD_RUM.init() with service='neural-dream-workshop', env='production'
trackUserInteractions: true, trackResources: true set
applicationId and clientToken placeholders are clearly marked as YOUR_APPLICATION_ID and YOUR_CLIENT_TOKEN
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: User must replace YOUR_APPLICATION_ID and YOUR_CLIENT_TOKEN with values from Datadog RUM Applications dashboard before this activates.

userStories.title: Run DREAMER dataset training to improve stress model
userStories.description: As a researcher, I need the stress model retrained with DREAMER (consumer Emotiv EPOC dataset, closest to Muse 2) so it exceeds the 60% activation threshold and appears in live inference.
acceptanceCriteria: python ml/training/train_dreamer.py runs without error
Script outputs a cross-validation accuracy number
If accuracy >= 60%: ml/models/saved/stress_model.pkl is updated
Training log saved to /tmp/train_dreamer_log.txt
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This story requires running Python training. May take 5-30 min depending on dataset size. DREAMER data downloaded automatically via train_dreamer.py.

userStories.title: Run TSception 4-channel training to improve flow state model
userStories.description: As a researcher, I need the TSception CNN trained on 4-channel EEG data so the flow state model exceeds the 60% threshold and starts showing in live inference sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: python ml/training/train_tsception.py runs without error
Script outputs a test accuracy number
ml/models/saved/eegnet_emotion_4ch.pt is updated with new weights
Training log saved to /tmp/train_tsception_log.txt
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: ml/training/train_tsception.py already exists. Check that n_channels=4 is configured before running.

userStories.title: Re-run mega LGBM unified training to incorporate new data
userStories.description: As a researcher, I need the mega LGBM emotion model retrained after the DREAMER and FACED data are added so the unified model benefits from the larger training set.
acceptanceCriteria: python ml/training/train_mega_lgbm_unified.py runs without error
Script outputs cross-validation accuracy (target: >= 74.21% baseline)
ml/models/saved/emotion_mega_lgbm.pkl updated
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Run after US-008 (DREAMER) completes. train_faced.py can also be run first to add FACED data before this mega retrain.

userStories.title: Update STATUS.md with post-retrain model accuracy numbers
userStories.description: As a researcher, I need STATUS.md to reflect the new model accuracy numbers after retraining so the benchmark dashboard shows accurate information.
acceptanceCriteria: STATUS.md model accuracy table updated with new CV accuracy for stress model
STATUS.md model accuracy table updated with new CV accuracy for flow state model
STATUS.md model accuracy table updated with new CV accuracy for emotion mega LGBM
Each row shows the new accuracy number and dataset used
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Run after US-008, US-009, US-010 complete.
